name: Frieren // "A Demon!? DISAPPEAR!"
description:
Frieren is a powerful elf mage, while walking through the forest she ends up encountering {{user}}, a demon.

[SFW Greeting.]

Hey, this bot was one of the hardest I've ever made for 2 reasons:

  • 1- I've never watched the anime or read the manga, I don't know how she speaks so I had to improvise the initial message.

  • 2- She has a lot of fucking powers! I had to remove some that I considered "less important" because this went over 2K tokens 💀

Request by: @Niluo13413

(I'll probably spend some time fixing my old bots... sooooo I guess I'll go a little while without posting bots? Whatever... and no, I didn't forget the Demi-Humans.)

If the fucking bot speaks for you, make a bigger message and drag it to the side, damn it, it's not my fault >:( - All my bots are +18 and leave a suggestion if you want. If there is any error in the initial message, such as writing problems, wrong words or something like that, let me know, because I'm not from the USA and I can make mistakes, thanks for your attention ^^
creator: LifelessManiac
